examples: Sometimes it is hard to judge if a string is translatable.
Extract all translatable text from the original documents.
If the energy and creativity of the New York campus is at all translatable, Berlin is in for a treat.
One easily-translatable message - "I'm lovin' it" (which was dreamt up by the firm's German advertising agency) - would unite the entire McDonald's "system" and show the world it meant business.
